setup.title: Welcome to ekmek-db
setup.subtitle: Create your administrator account. These credentials are stored locally and hashed — they never leave this machine.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your administrator credentials to manage the database.
login.locked: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

overview.subtitle: Here is what your database looks like right now.

data.title: Data
data.subtitle: Every top-level key in your database. Edit values as JSON.
data.empty: No data yet. Add your first entry to get started.
data.clearConfirm: Delete every entry in the database? This cannot be undone.

transfer.title: Import / Export
transfer.subtitle: Move your dataset in and out as JSON.
transfer.exportDesc: Download a JSON snapshot of the entire database.
transfer.importDesc: Load a JSON file into the database.
transfer.mergeDesc: Keep existing keys, add or overwrite imported ones.
transfer.replaceDesc: Wipe the database first, then load the file.
transfer.drop: Drop a .json file here or click to choose
transfer.replaceWarn: Replace mode will erase current data first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the server, appearance, and security.
settings.portHint: Changing the port re-binds the server immediately. Reconnect on the new address.
settings.hostHint: 0.0.0.0 exposes the dashboard on your local network.
settings.readOnlyHint: Block all changes to the data. Settings stay editable.
settings.allowlistHint: One IP per line. When set, only these IPs may connect. Leave empty to allow all.
settings.blocklistHint: One IP per line. These IPs are always denied.
settings.passwordChanged: Password changed. Please sign in again.
